mapper.select: select * from sys_admin_user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_admin_user where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_admin_user where super_admin = 1 and deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from sys_admin_user where deleted = 0 order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_admin_user(username, password_hash, nickname, enabled, super_admin, last_login_time, create_by, update_by, create_by_name, update_by_name, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values(#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{enabled}, #{superAdmin}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createByName}, #{updateByName}, #{deleted}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_admin_user set nickname = #{nickname}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_by_name = #{updateByName}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_admin_user set enabled = #{enabled}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_by_name = #{updateByName}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_admin_user set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_by_name = #{updateByName}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update sys_admin_user set last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
